iyattā, iyattvaṃ
1 (a) So much, fixed measure or quantity; īdṛktayā rūpamiyattayā vā  R. 13. 5 ; na… yaśaḥ paricchettumiyattayālaṃ 6. 77 ;  K. 129 , 182.  (b) Limited number, limitation
(pb) na guṇānāmiyattayā  R. 10. 32. 
2 Limit, standard.
